old_value: {"id":"agent-swarm-2y2.2","title":"Strategy: Naive Sequential Baseline (no protection)","description":"Implement naive sequential training with no anti-forgetting mechanism. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vhdrostami@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:26Z","created_by":"vahid","updated_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:26Z"}

{"id":"agent-swarm-2y2.3","title":"Strategy: EWC (Elastic Weight Consolidation)","description":"Implement EWC — after each task, compute Fisher Information Matrix for all weights. Add penalty Loss = Task_Loss + λ*Σ F_i*(θ_i - θ*_i)² with λ=1000. Files: src/strategies/ewc/__init__.py, src/strategies/ewc/ewc.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vhdrostami@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z","created_by":"vahid","updated_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z"}

{"id":"agent-swarm-2y2.4","title":"Strategy: Neurogenesis (Progressive Growing)","description":"Implement neurogenesis — for each new task, add 32 neurons per hidden layer. Freeze existing neuron weights (mature neurons). Only train new neurons + new task head. Files: src/strategies/neurogenesis/__init__.py, src/strategies/neurogenesis/neurogenesis.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vhdrostami@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z","created_by":"vahid","updated_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z"}

{"id":"agent-swarm-2y2.5","title":"Strategy: Sleep Replay with Distortion","description":"Implement sleep replay — after each epoch, replay 100 distorted samples from previous tasks (Gaussian noise σ=0.1, random 1-2px shifts, partial images). Between tasks, run 10 epochs of pure replay (sleep phase). Files: src/strategies/replay/__init__.py, src/strategies/replay/replay.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vhdrostami@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z","created_by":"vahid","updated_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z"}

{"id":"agent-swarm-2y2.6","title":"Strategy: CLS (Complementary Learning Systems — Dual Memory)","description":"Implement CLS dual memory — Fast learner (64-32 neurons, lr=0.05) learns new tasks quickly. Slow learner (256-128 neurons, lr=0.001) receives interleaved pseudo-examples from fast learner. Test only the slow learner. Files: src/strategies/cls/__init__.py, src/strategies/cls/cls.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vhdrostami@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z","created_by":"vahid","updated_at":"2026-03-01T16:10:27Z"}

new_value: Completed: Implemented NaiveStrategy - naive sequential baseline with plain SGD, no anti-forgetting protection. Implements all Strategy ABC methods (train_task, evaluate, on_task_complete as no-op, get_all_accuracies). Import test and smoke test pass.
Completed: Sleep Replay with Distortion strategy - replay buffer, distorted replay (gaussian noise, pixel shifts, patch masking), sleep phase between tasks
Completed: Implemented CLS dual-memory strategy with fast learner (hippocampus) and slow learner (neocortex), pseudo-rehearsal via knowledge distillation, and interleaved training across all tasks
Completed: Implemented EWC strategy with Fisher Information Matrix computation, per-task snapshots, and EWC penalty during training. Files: src/strategies/ewc/__init__.py, src/strategies/ewc/ewc.py

Completed: Implemented NeurogenesisStrategy with progressive growing - grows hidden layers by 32 neurons per task, freezes old weights via per-batch snapshot/restore, only trains new connections + current task head
